case_title: LORRAINE CONN VS. PANERA BREAD, A CALIOFORNIA BUSINES ENTITY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONN, LORRAINE AN IN  KIDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT PANERA BREAD, A CALIOFORNIA BUSINES ENTITY GOLDEN GATE BREAD, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-12-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-12-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-20-2014
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-12-2014 CONTINUED TO DEC-24-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 14357032)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-03-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-24-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-03-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
